features.name: struct type used in array subscript expression
features.description: Code should include a struct type used where an array subscript is expected, causing Verilator to generate invalid C++ with type name instead of variable in subscript position

features.name: struct with x-assign 0 option
features.description: Code should include a struct variable used with array-style access while running with --x-assign 0 option that affects assignment code generation
